summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Suburbmates iteration 2 with real Supabase integration. All new pages (About, Pricing, Contact, Auth, Directory) render perfectly with Huly-aligned design. Design consistency maintained across all pages with proper warm amber CTAs, blue-violet accents, and rounded borders.

integration_issues.issue: FreshSignals component data-testid not found during initial test, but component appears to be loading correctly

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section 'Get Your Products Discovered' and proper gradient styling
About page (/about) renders with Huly design: pill badges, rounded cards, atmospheric glows, proper text contrast
Pricing page (/pricing) renders with $0/forever card, feature checklist with check icons, pill CTAs, FAQ section
Directory page (/regions) loads with DirectoryHeader 'The Creator Feed', search functionality, region filters (Inner Metro, Northern, Western, Eastern, Southern), category filters
Login page (/auth/login) renders with rounded card, Google auth button, email input field, magic link CTA
Signup page (/auth/signup) renders with name/email inputs, creator checkbox functionality, business name field appears when creator selected, submit button text changes appropriately
Contact page (/contact) renders with contact form (all fields working), sidebar with email link (hello@suburbmates.com.au), FAQ section with 5 items
All text is readable with proper contrast - light text (rgb(240, 240, 245)) on dark background
Warm amber/orange CTA buttons (rgb(249, 115, 22)) appear consistently across all pages
Blue-violet atmosphere accent used consistently for labels, badges, pills
Rounded borders (2xl/pill) used consistently throughout all pages
Navigation between pages works correctly (About, Directory links functional)
Plus Jakarta Sans font family correctly implemented for headings
Mobile responsiveness verified - mobile navigation found and content visible
All form inputs accept text correctly and are functional
Atmospheric glows present on all pages for visual depth
Real Supabase data integration working (Directory page shows loading states and creator listings)
